checkpoints.description: Top area clean: no overlap among title/(a+b)^2/edge labels.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Check whether there is any overlap or crowding in the top area, especially around (a+b)^2 and the top edge labels.

checkpoints.description: (a+b)^2 uses ghost movement to equation; no arrow-style mapping for this term.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Verify mapping style for (a+b)^2: should be ghost transform, not an arrow.

checkpoints.description: Outer and center shapes appear square; right triangles look right-angled; labels a/b appear on top and vertical edges.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Check geometry correctness: square integrity, right-triangle structure, and a/b label completeness on top and vertical sides.

checkpoints.description: No stray/protruding green marker outside the big square.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Check for accidental artifacts or protruding marker lines outside the main square.

checkpoints.description: Four triangle ghosts gather simultaneously to 4·ab/2 (not one-by-one arrows).
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Verify the four triangle areas aggregate with simultaneous ghost movement, and no one-by-one arrow sequence is used.

checkpoints.description: After triangle gather, center c^2 square flashes then center square ghost moves to equation c^2.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Check narrative order: triangles first, then c^2. Confirm c^2 mapping uses center square ghost movement, not text-only movement.

checkpoints.description: Formula and geometry stay above subtitle-safe area; no subtitle occlusion with key math content.
checkpoints.mcp_prompt: Evaluate whether key visual content remains clear above subtitle-safe zone without major overlap.
